sizing_rule.note: Use the absolute value of the farthest outlier in your trade distribution (measured in standard deviations from mean) as the bounding parameter for optimal f calculation. Derive cumulative probability using standard normal distribution equation (Equation 3.21) rather than assuming fixed sigma bounds. This is data-driven optimal f calibration based on actual trade distribution extremes.

source_rule_text: Determine position sizing parameters by using the absolute value of the farthest point from the mean in standard deviations rather than assuming a fixed number of sigmas, then calculate associated probabilities using the standard normal distribution equation.
